mapper.sql: id, material_id, user_id, scene, status, question_answer_json_str, deleted, ctime, mtime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_review_task WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND scene = #{scene} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_review_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_review_task (material_id, user_id, scene, status, question_answer_json_str, deleted, ctime, mtime) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{userId}, #{scene}, #{status}, #{questionAnswerJsonStr}, #{deleted}, #{ctime}, #{mtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_review_task SET status = #{status}, question_answer_json_str = #{questionAnswerJsonStr}, mtime = #{mtime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_review_task SET deleted = 1, mtime = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
